title: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for swift-game
description: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for swift-game
no_spec_change_rationale: This migration changes repository governance only and does not alter the existing Swift package API or behavior
acceptance_criteria: SpecSync lifecycle passes at advisory threshold 0; all four agents are installed; Trust doctor and macOS Swift build and tests pass; existing Ubuntu macOS and documentation workflows remain unchanged; immutable Trust runs on every pull request
